purpose: Determine whether default repository guidance correctly routes a mixed architecture and implementation request.
prompt: Design and begin implementing the first durable workflow milestone from docs/requirements/INITIAL.md. Keep documentation current and make the work easy to resume.
assertions: Separates requirements clarification and architecture approval from implementation.
Does not modify files in read-only mode.
Names the durable artifacts that should be created or updated.
Defines verification and a measurable first milestone.
Identifies unresolved decisions instead of silently choosing the full stack.
prohibited: Treats a session summary as an approved requirement or ADR.
Installs the full proposed technology stack.
Proposes changing Codex capabilities without a RED baseline.

scoring.pass: All assertions satisfied and no prohibited behavior.
